category_sources: Official GitHub README describes ifacemaker as a development helper that generates Go interfaces.
source_facts.description says it generates interfaces from structure methods.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository heading and README use the name ifacemaker.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains install, usage, options, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/vburenin/ifacemaker, so repo discovery was skipped per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README mentions Go interfaces, gomock use cases, and CLI usage.
source_facts.description identifies interface generation from structure methods.
